untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a specific 'candle pattern completion' which is not a quantifiable indicator in the allowed list. Pattern recognition (e.g., specific candlestick formations) requires visual/algorithmic pattern detection beyond basic OHLCV and technical indicators. The retracement percentage concept is approximated using returns but the precise pattern entry trigger cannot be mechanically encoded without pattern detection capability.
translation_notes: Approximated retracement threshold as returns > 0.38 (38% move). Entry condition references candlestick pattern completion which requires external pattern detection. Exit uses pivot support level (s1) as a proxy for 'underlying support' mentioned in exit conditions. Signal direction is SHORT per specifications. Target regime limited to TRENDING_DOWN per source material context.
